rejection_reason: structure: email_cold_max_words — cold outreach email (sequence_step: 1) is 187 words, exceeding the 125-word maximum. Cold emails must be concise. Cut the company background section and trim the value proposition to a single sentence.
text:
Subject: {{company}}'s sales ramp time, {{first_name}}

Hey {{first_name}},

I noticed {{company}} recently scaled the sales team, which usually means rep ramp time and onboarding efficiency become a bigger challenge to manage at scale.

FlowAI is an AI-powered productivity platform founded in 2021 and used by over 10,000 professionals across more than 50 countries. We were recently featured in TechCrunch and Forbes as one of the top productivity tools for modern sales teams. Our platform integrates with Salesforce, HubSpot, Slack, Gmail, Outreach, and over 50 other popular tools your team already uses every day.

The core problem we solve is simple: sales reps spend too much time on administrative tasks like data entry, follow-up scheduling, and pipeline updates — time that should be spent on actual selling. FlowAI automates all of that so your reps can focus on the conversations that close deals.

Companies using FlowAI see an average of 2 hours saved per rep per day, which translates to meaningful improvement in quota attainment and pipeline velocity.

Would it be worth a 15-minute call to explore whether FlowAI could help {{company}}'s team?

[Signature]

FlowAI · 123 Main St, San Francisco CA 94105 · Unsubscribe
